user.title: OpenAI-Compatible STT Setup
user.description: Configure your OpenAI-compatible speech-to-text endpoint. Works with OlliteRT, OpenAI, and any compatible server.

data_description.api_key: API key for authentication. Leave empty if your server doesn't require one (e.g., OlliteRT on local network).
data_description.api_url: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible API (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:8000/v1 for OlliteRT)
data_description.name: A friendly name for this STT instance (e.g., 'OlliteRT Whisper', 'OpenAI STT')

model.title: Select Model
model.description: Choose a speech-to-text model. If your server's models were detected, select from the dropdown. You can also type a custom model name.

data_description.model: The STT model name to use (e.g., 'whisper-1', 'moonshine-base'). Must match a model available on your server.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key. Please check your API key and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the API server. Please check the API URL and ensure the server is running.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This API endpoint is already configured.

data_description.friendly_name: A friendly name for this STT entity (e.g., 'Kitchen Voice', 'Bedroom Assistant')
data_description.model: The STT model name to use. Select from detected models or type a custom name.
data_description.prompt: Optional prompt to guide transcription style and vocabulary
data_description.temperature: Model temperature (0-1). Lower is more deterministic, higher is more creative.
data_description.realtime: Enable OpenAI Realtime API for streaming transcription (OpenAI only)
data_description.noise_reduction: Type of noise reduction to apply (Realtime API only)
